C

calculateMonthlyPayment(double, double, int) - Method in interface com.fincredit.interfaces.ILoanable
 
calculateMonthlyPayment(double, double, int) - Method in class com.fincredit.model.LoanProduct
Method to calculate the monthly payment for a loan using the standard amortization formula, which takes into account the principal amount, annual interest rate, and loan term in months.
canAfford(double) - Method in class com.fincredit.model.Client
 
Client - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing a client in the financial system, extending the Person class and including financial attributes such as monthly income and expenses.

ClientFileManager — Management of client data in a text file (clients.txt).

ConsumerLoan - Class in com.fincredit.model
Class representing a consumer loan product, extending the LoanProduct class and providing specific details such as base interest rate, maximum term, and description for general consumer goods financing.
